summary: Finance v2 sprint fully verified end-to-end. All 10 pytest cases in test_finance_v2.py pass against BOTH internal (localhost:8001) and public preview URL. 40 additional regression tests (auth/password_lifecycle, pdf_docs, real_integrations, crm_enrichment, sla_products, sprint_extras) all green. UI E2E on /portal/admin/finance validated: 8 tab pills, 4 KPI cards ('Net loss' correctly turns red for negative), header 'This month' + '2026 annual' download buttons, Kas Kecil add-entry form submits and refreshes list, delete-with-confirm works, Reports tab shows 12 month tiles + 3 annual tiles + audit-log table with LOCKED/EDITABLE badges. XLSX downloads verified via the UI's ?token= query-param auth: monthly workbook contains 6 sheets (Summary/Revenue/Expenses/Kas Kecil/Salaries/Sales Fees), annual workbook contains 3 sheets (P&L/Assets/Revenue) as spec'd. Locked-month 403 message is human-readable: 'Cannot add petty cash for locked month 2025-01. Contact finance to unlock.' Regression on client Order wizard (4-step, product picker + history), client dashboard/invoices/tickets, admin CRM enrichment table, admin Real Integrations page and change-password route all clean.

verified_backend.prior_month_403: POST /admin/kas-kecil w/ date=2025-01-15 -> 403 'Cannot add petty cash for locked month 2025-01. Contact finance to unlock.' (human-readable)
verified_backend.detailed_endpoint: Returns revenue_rows(12), expenses_rows(0), kas_kecil_rows(1), salaries_rows(1), sales_fees_rows(1), assets_rows(1) + totals{revenue,expenses_recurring,kas_kecil,salaries,sales_fees,expenses_all,depreciation_accumulated,net_profit} all present. Net_profit = -Rp 5,956,738 (loss)
verified_backend.monthly_xlsx: content-type=application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet, filename=Intercloud_Finance_2026-07.xlsx, 8697 bytes, sheets=[Summary 2026-07, Revenue, Expenses, Kas Kecil, Salaries, Sales Fees]
verified_backend.annual_xlsx: content-type=xlsx, sheets=[P&L 2026 (14r x 10c), Assets 2026 (3r x 7c), Revenue 2026 (14r x 4c)]
verified_backend.reports_audit: Monthly 2026-07 -> locked=false (current month), Annual 2026 -> locked=true (always locked). Rule works.

verified_frontend.kpi_values_shown: Revenue Rp3.385.500 / Expenses Rp8.650.000 / Depreciation Rp692.238 / Net loss Rp-5.956.738 (red)
verified_frontend.kas_kecil_add_flow: click 'Add entry' -> form modal -> fill date/amount/category/vendor/notes -> Save -> row count goes from 1 -> 2 -> list refreshed
verified_frontend.kas_kecil_delete_flow: click trash -> window.confirm accepted -> row count returns to 1
verified_frontend.reports_tab: 12 month tiles (2026-07..2025-08) + 3 annual tiles (2026/2025/2024) + audit-log table with 'EDITABLE' (2026-07 monthly) and 'LOCKED' (2026 annual) badges
verified_frontend.download_buttons_work: ?token= query-param auth returns real xlsx files (verified via openpyxl)

regression_tests_passed.total: 45/45 on public URL + 5 admin PDF/quotation covered

critical_code_review_comments: portal/routes.py is now 3745 lines — approaching the >700-line split threshold from guidelines but consistently over the whole project. Non-blocking; suggest future split by domain (finance.py / crm.py / integrations.py) to improve maintainability.
Frontend AdminFinance.jsx (287 lines) is well-modularized with KPI/SummaryPane/RevenueList/LedgerPane/AssetsList/ReportsPane sub-components. Good structure.
LedgerPane delete confirm uses window.confirm(); acceptable for internal admin tool, but a shadcn AlertDialog would be more consistent with the rest of the portal (non-blocking).
test_credentials: Admin: admin@intercloud-digital.com / AdminIntercloud2026! · Client: demo@client.com / ClientDemo2026!
seed_data_creation: During UI test, one Kas Kecil entry was added and then deleted in the same run (net zero DB drift).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finance v2 sprint (kas_kecil/salaries/sales_fees ledgers + monthly/annual xlsx reports + audit log with locked flag) is production-ready. Current calendar date at test time was 2026-07-21 — so 2026-07 monthly is EDITABLE and everything <2026-07 is LOCKED. The Jan 1-5 grace-window branch of _month_locked was NOT exercised at this date; main agent should add a time-freezing test with freezegun if that edge case needs coverage. XLSX auth uses ?token=<jwt> query param (see AdminFinance.jsx line 30). Route for change password is /portal/{admin,client}/settings/password, NOT /portal/account/password (my earlier probe used the wrong URL — no bug, just script error). Integrations page lists CONFIGURED servers only; the 8-module registry (cpanel/plesk/proxmox/mikrotik/duitku/xendit/midtrans/smtp) is exposed via the 'Add Server/Module' dialog — expected behavior.
rca of the issue: No functional issues found; all specified acceptance criteria met.
